title: Connecting multiple phases of the tasks or projects through links
excerpt:

posts.author: karinagabani (Karina Gabani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I’m from IAMOPS, DevOps service provider. For IAMOPS, monday.com is the centralized information hub, and Project Management Platform.
Basically, in IAMOPS sprints are of one week and we manage task with 4 boards:

  • Epic Board: To define Epic and Track progress

  • Backlog Board: To keep all action Item, or the Tasks that we need to perform

  • Sprint Board: Dedicated for the Tasks and action Item need to be done in current sprint.

  • History Board: We move all the tasks to history board after our sprint Retrospective.

We are facing an issue in establishing connections between partially completed tasks and the remaining pending tasks that span multiple sprints.

To Address this issue we have following suggestion:

  • Link Column: It would be great, if we will be able to add multiple link for the one task to link all the phases of the tasks.

  • Link Task : In Linear, we have feature where we can link the tasks, stories, bugs or Epic. If we have similar kind of feature on our moday.com then connecting the task will be much more effective and there will be no chance of human error.
